---
title: "Verification Queue"
subtitle: "Evidence-backed review status for registry entries"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
---

<div class="page-intro">
This page tracks which dataset entries still need manual verification against source repository records and primary publications. The queue is conservative: entries remain here unless they have been reviewed and promoted to a higher verification status. Presence in the queue does not mean an entry is wrong; it means the metadata should not yet be treated as final.
</div>

## Queue Summary

<div id="verification-queue"></div>

---

## Verification Status Definitions

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `seed_entry` | Initial registry entry; not fully verified |
| `source_link_checked` | Source record opens and matches the accession or resource |
| `metadata_checked` | Disease group, sample type, platform, and access metadata checked against source |
| `publication_checked` | Primary publication title, year, DOI, and PMID checked where available |
| `analysis_ready_candidate` | Candidate for downstream analysis after source, metadata, publication, and access checks; still not a guarantee of fitness for every use case |
| `needs_revision` | Source evidence conflicts with current registry metadata or key fields are obsolete |

---

## Manual Review Rule

Rows should remain in the queue when any of the following are true:

- source URL is missing or does not point directly to the intended record
- publication title, year, DOI, or PMID is unclear
- disease groups, sample type, platform, or access status are unclear
- the resource is a broad portal or multi-accession aggregate
- individual-level data require controlled access
- source evidence contradicts the current row

Do not promote a row to `analysis_ready_candidate` without a human review of the evidence and the intended analysis context.
